CREDITS_INSUFFICIENT: Credits provided are insufficient. Minimum required: {{minimumCreditsRequired}}, provided: {{providedCredits}}
PUBLISH_ERROR_ASSETS_TYPE_MISSING: Under General, choose whether your clips use AI or not.
PUBLISH_ERROR_TYPE_MISSING: Pick the template type: free, premium, or AI.
PUBLISH_ERROR_OUTPUT_TYPE_MISSING: Pick what people get: an image or a video.
PUBLISH_ERROR_COLOR_VIDEO_MISSING: Upload the main full-color video for the cutout style.
PUBLISH_ERROR_MASK_VIDEO_MISSING: Upload the black-and-white mask video for the cutout style.
PUBLISH_ERROR_BODYMOVIN_JSON_MISSING: Add the After Effects animation file (the one you export for the app).
PUBLISH_ERROR_TRANSPARENT_WEBM_BODYMOVIN: For this style you need the After Effects animation file—add it under Template Assets.
PUBLISH_ERROR_SCENE_TRANSPARENT_WEBM_MIS: Scene "{{name}}" needs a transparent video on it.
PUBLISH_ERROR_WORKFLOW_TYPE_MISSING: Under General, pick how the template runs: AI only, AI + After Effects, or After Effects only.
PUBLISH_ERROR_WORKFLOW_TYPE_INVALID: Pick a valid workflow under General (AI only, AI + After Effects, or After Effects only).
PUBLISH_ERROR_AE_ONLY_NO_ASSETS: You chose After Effects only. Under Template Assets, add the After Effects animation file, and either a transparent video on each scene or the main video plus mask video together.
PUBLISH_ERROR_AI_ONLY_NO_CLIPS: You chose AI only. Turn clips to AI under General, add clips, and finish each clip’s AI flow—or switch to After Effects only if you don’t need AI.
PUBLISH_ERROR_AI_PLUS_AE_WITH_NON_AI_TYP: You chose AI + After Effects, but clips are set to non-AI. Either switch clips to AI and build the AI part, or change the workflow to After Effects only.
PUBLISH_ERROR_AI_PLUS_AE_MISSING_CLIPS: You chose AI + After Effects. Add at least one AI clip and save its AI flow.
PUBLISH_ERROR_AE_DETAIL_BODYMOVIN: Add and save the After Effects animation file under Template Assets.
PUBLISH_ERROR_AE_DETAIL_COLOR: Upload the main color video for the cutout style.
PUBLISH_ERROR_AE_DETAIL_MASK: Upload the mask video for the cutout style.
PUBLISH_ERROR_AE_ASSETS_INCOMPLETE_GENER: Template Assets aren’t complete. Add the After Effects animation file, transparent videos on scenes if you use them, or the main and mask videos together.
PUBLISH_ERROR_NO_AI_OR_AE: Pick a workflow under General, then add either the AI clip side or the Template Assets side.
PUBLISH_ERROR_AI_CLIPS_MISSING: Add at least one clip while AI clips are turned on.
PUBLISH_ERROR_CLIP_WORKFLOW_MISSING: Clip {{index}} needs its AI flow opened and saved.
